title: Main Plot
subtitle: Journey through 5 acts with 50 unique locations, each with its own enemies, story, and modifiers.
unlock2: Orders 2-8: complete the previous location first
actUnlockDesc: Complete the main chain (orders 1-8) of an act to unlock the next one. Side branches (orders 9-10) are optional and don't block progression.
monsterLevelsDesc: Monster level increases with each location and act. Early Act 1 enemies start at low levels, while Act 5 late-stage monsters can reach level 50. Match your character level to the area for optimal XP.
